message:
perf(spec-evolution): replace O(n) findIndex lookups with Map-based index for filtered navigation

The spec evolution viewer was calling filtered.findIndex() on every
navigation action (prev/next/playback/selection), which is O(n) per call
across potentially thousands of commits.

- Build a Map<commitIdx, filteredIdx> via useMemo that updates only when
  the filtered array changes
- Replace all 5 findIndex() call sites (selectedFilteredIdx, goPrev,
  goNext, playback interval, and selection) with O(1) Map.get() lookups
- Add filteredIndexByCommitIdx to dependency arrays for correct memoization
- Net effect: navigation and playback are now O(1) instead of O(n)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
